request_payload.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, you know how important it is to be prepared. But did you know that excessive civil defense spending actually weakens our national security? Experts agree that balanced investment in modern deterrence is far more effective than outdated preparedness programs. Let's focus on real security, not just checking boxes. #SmartDefense #NationalSecurityFirst
